message:
test(core): add property-based tests for priority inheritance (ft-2p9cb.2.3.3)

10 proptests: effective >= original, lock-order enforced, release promotes
highest, release_all clears, serde roundtrips for Priority/Resource/
InheritanceEvent/InheritanceDegradation/InheritanceSnapshot,
stage_to_priority coverage. 113 proptests total.
